question: liquidity and capital resources position
labeling_hint: Look for a chunk in Item 7 that contains the phrase "Liquidity and Capital Resources" as a subheading; pick a firm with material cash position discussion.

question: interest rate risk sensitivity analysis
labeling_hint: Item 7A chunk discussing interest-rate sensitivity in basis-points or a +/- 100bp scenario.

question: revenue recognition accounting policy
labeling_hint: Item 8 footnote titled "Revenue Recognition" or "Revenue from Contracts with Customers" (ASC 606).

question: foreign currency exchange rate hedging
labeling_hint: Item 7A chunk naming specific currencies (EUR/GBP/JPY) and hedge instruments (forwards/options).

question: goodwill impairment testing and result
labeling_hint: Item 8 footnote "Goodwill and Intangibles"; look for quantitative impairment test result.

question: operating cash flow reconciliation to net income
labeling_hint: Item 8 chunk showing the indirect-method reconciliation (net income + D&A + working-capital changes).

question: segment reporting and revenue by geography
labeling_hint: Item 7 MD&A chunk discussing geographic or product-segment revenue mix.

question: commodity price hedging instruments
labeling_hint: Item 7A chunk naming a commodity (oil/gas/aluminum) and the derivative used.

question: stock based compensation expense
labeling_hint: Item 8 footnote "Stock-Based Compensation" with a dollar expense figure.

question: income tax rate reconciliation to statutory
labeling_hint: Item 8 "Income Taxes" footnote showing effective-rate reconciliation to 21%.

question: critical accounting estimates disclosure
labeling_hint: Item 7 subheading "Critical Accounting Estimates" — one chunk per material estimate.

question: debt maturities and contractual obligations
labeling_hint: Item 7 contractual-obligations table discussion OR nearest surrounding text.

question: revenue growth drivers year over year
labeling_hint: Item 7 MD&A chunk explaining YoY revenue change (unit growth, pricing, FX, acquisitions).

question: gross margin trend and cost of revenue drivers
labeling_hint: Item 7 chunk explaining gross-margin movement and the cost components driving it.

question: derivatives and risk management instruments
labeling_hint: Item 7A chunk on the derivatives program (cash-flow vs fair-value hedges).

question: deferred revenue and contract liabilities
labeling_hint: Item 8 footnote "Contract Balances" or "Deferred Revenue".

question: allowance for credit losses methodology
labeling_hint: Item 8 footnote on CECL / allowance for expected credit losses.

question: operating expenses breakdown research development
labeling_hint: Item 7 chunk breaking out R&D vs SG&A vs other opex.

question: counterparty credit risk exposure
labeling_hint: Item 7A chunk on counterparty exposure (usually discussing high-grade counterparties).

question: subsequent events after balance sheet date
labeling_hint: Item 8 final footnote titled "Subsequent Events".

question: capital expenditure plans fiscal 2025
labeling_hint: Item 7 forward-looking capex narrative; often under "Investing Activities" or "Capital Expenditures".
notes: TO LABEL (bonus — 21st pair for statistical margin)

question: inflation impact on input costs
labeling_hint: Item 7 chunk explicitly naming inflation as a margin / cost pressure.

question: equity market risk exposure
labeling_hint: Item 7A chunk on marketable-securities sensitivity or equity-price VaR.

question: pension plan funded status
labeling_hint: Item 8 footnote "Employee Benefit Plans" with funded-status table discussion.

question: critical audit matters raised by auditor
labeling_hint: Item 8 auditor's report section titled "Critical Audit Matters" — not every filing has one.
